allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d securicompte_db -c "SELECT username, password FROM users;")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 4124 -Force" 2>&1 && sleep 2 && netstat -ano | findstr :8080 || echo "Port libéré")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -h localhost -d securicompte_db -c "GRANT CREATE ON SCHEMA public TO securicompte_user;" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -h localhost -d securicompte_db -c "DELETE FROM flyway_schema_history WHERE version = '7';" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=securicompte_pass psql -U securicompte_user -d securicompte_db -c "
SELECT c.numero_client, c.nom,
       MIN\(s.dat_souscription\) as min_sousc,
       s.type_souscription,
       MIN\(sm.annee * 100 + sm.mois\) as premier_stock
FROM client c
JOIN souscription s ON s.client_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN stock_mensuel sm ON sm.client_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.numero_client, c.nom, s.type_souscription
HAVING MIN\(sm.annee * 100 + sm.mois\) > MIN\(s.dat_souscription :: text ::int\) + 200
   AND MIN\(sm.annee * 100 + sm.mois\) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY \(MIN\(sm.annee * 100 + sm.mois\) - \(MIN\(s.dat_souscription\)::text::int\)\) DESC
LIMIT 5;
" 2>/dev/null || PGPASSWORD=securicompte_pass psql -U securicompte_user -d securicompte_db -c "
SELECT c.numero_client, c.nom,
       MIN\(s.dat_souscription\) as min_sousc,
       MIN\(sm.annee * 100 + sm.mois\) as premier_stock
FROM client c
JOIN souscription s ON s.client_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN stock_mensuel sm ON sm.client_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.numero_client, c.nom
HAVING MIN\(s.dat_souscription\) < '2023-01-01' AND MIN\(sm.annee * 100 + sm.mois\) > 202400
LIMIT 5;
")
